signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), below market forecasts of 2.4%** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][3]

This March figure—latest available data updated in early 2026—marks a modest uptick amid Middle East-driven energy shocks but stayed under expectations and the Bank of Korea's 2% target, with the BoK holding rates at 2.5% for a seventh meeting on April 10[1
